path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad ﷺ/Ali carried the flag of Aqa ﷺ.jpeg
text: hakim:4665 - Ahmad b. Jafar al-Qati1 > ‘Abdullah b. Ahmad b. Hanbal from my father > Sayyar b. Hatim > Jafar b. Sulayman > Malik b. Dinar [Machine] I asked Sa'id ibn Jubayr and said, "0 Abu Abdullah, who carried the flag of the Messenger of Allah e 7" He looked at me and said, "You seem to be in a state of confusion." I became angry and complained about him to his brothers from the Qur'ra (reciters). I said to them, "Are you not amazed by Sa'id? I asked him who carried the flag of the Messenger of Allah £ and he looked at me and said, 'You seem to be in a state of confusion."" They said, "You asked him while he was afraid of Al-Hajjaj and had sought refuge in the Ka'bah, so ask him now." So, I asked him and he said, "Ali carried it. This is what I heard from Abdullah ibn Abbas." @® - No Grade (Dhahabi)
